blockingIssues.description: DI012 now groups same-flow registrations by the immediate IServiceCollection receiver symbol, so registrations made through invoked wrapper/helper methods on the same flow no longer compare and real ignored-TryAdd/duplicate cases can be missed.
DI007 still exempts any method named Create* or Build*, which leaves ordinary application/helper methods such as BuildReport or CreateOrder silently outside the service-locator diagnostic boundary.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the required final-validator list to include the repo's `site` validation command alongside `build`, `test`, and `lint`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `.factory/skills/analyzer-worker/SKILL.md` still lists only `build`, `test`, and `lint`, while this mission's `AGENTS.md` treats `build`, `test`, `lint`, and `site` as the authoritative final validation set.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the current DI007 Create*/Build* method-name exemption as shared guidance.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the scrutiny review found that exemption to be the blocking product issue itself; documenting it now would codify behavior that likely needs to be narrowed instead.
